items.title: McDonald's Exec Stirs Up Bitcoin Crowd With McRib Return
items.description: Bitcoin (sometimes) pumps when the McRib returns. Will this sweet, slathered meat help BTC repeat the feat?

items.title: Quality Over Hype: Investing Wisely for the Long Term
items.description: Nancy Tengler shares her market outlook and favorite stocks.

items.title: Burger King Follows Familiar Game Plan for China Expansion: Find a Partner
items.description: Burger King’s parent company is doing a joint venture with a Chinese investment firm to inject new capital to expand the burger chain’s business in China.

items.title: Here's How Much $1000 Invested In McDonald's 20 Years Ago Would Be Worth Today
A 28-Year-Old Bought Houses And Reached A $1 Million Net Worth Without A Six-Figure Job: 'By The Time We Got To The Third House, I Was 18'
items.description: Sebastian Marquez reached a $1 million net worth without a six-figure job by getting started early, he told CNBC. The 28-year-old picked up jobs at McDonald's (NYSE:MCD), Walmart (NYSE:WMT), and a chicken farm to save extra money. He saved up $8,000 ...
